commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=220dfa8c211ca596adab339303eedefa427c4fcc)
commands.review_summary:
This PR replaces the gateway attachment base64 regex validator with a non-decoding character-code scan.

PR surface: Source +19. Total +19 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence fresh reproduction was established. Current source and the linked reporter logs point to the regex validator in the gateway attachment path, but no current-main WebChat/mobile large-image repro or after-fix artifact was provided here.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer action is needed to provide real behavior proof and repair the lint finding; ClawSweeper should not take this into the repair lane while the external proof gate is missing.

target.title: fix: replace regex in isValidBase64 with Buffer round-trip to prevent stack overflow on large attachments
target.author: zachzion762

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
